Petition To Transfer Venue For Trust Proceedings To The County Of San Mateo
Off Calendar Jan-29-2020 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-30-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PCN-17-300861 Conservatorship of Kerstin Westerstahl and
PTR-17-300864 The 2005 Kerstin Westerstahl Trust.

Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Kelsey Stiles (Conservator/Trustee).

The Court raised the issue of co-mingling of accounts and fees. Mr. Schultz stated that his Client is a Professional Fiduciary in San Mateo, that San Mateo County allows it, that he will talk with Ms. Stiles and that going forward it will be split. The Court granted the First Account and Report of Conservator, etc. and the First Account and Report of Successor Trustee, etc. (subject to review of the orders).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
